panels.title: Commander's Snapshot
panels.description: Top-level green/yellow/red summary derived from existing status sections. Runs no new commands.

panels.title: System Core
panels.description: Server/brain state and library counts.

panels.title: AI Brains
panels.description: Detected AI brain modules and availability.

panels.title: Trading Bridge
panels.description: Read-only view of sealed trading-research lifecycles. No order path.

panels.title: Content Engine
panels.description: Content/clone engine status.

panels.title: Money Engine
panels.description: Affiliate/money engine posture and product lock.

panels.title: Moving Company
panels.description: Moving-company workflow signal.

panels.title: Daily Mission
panels.description: Guidance actions derived from current content/money flags.

panels.title: Safety Gates
panels.description: Hard locked posture statements. The console cannot flip them.

panels.title: Git State
panels.description: Read-only git plumbing: branch, head, clean/dirty, change counts.

panels.title: Operator Safety
panels.description: Static posture flags asserting no execution/broker/secret/force-git affordance.

panels.title: Project Files
panels.description: Stat-only confirmation that key JARVIS artifacts exist.

panels.title: Brain Memory
panels.description: Stat-only scan of the brain_memory tree and known projects.

panels.title: Recommended Next Actions
panels.description: Static read-only recommended next actions.

panels.title: Health Report
panels.description: Displays manually generated compile/test status from a cached report.

panels.title: Mission Board
panels.description: Display-only operator mission board from a tracked JSON file.

panels.title: Trading Research Detail
panels.description: Read-only summary of committed/local research reports. No broker/paper/live.

panels.title: Route Smoke
panels.description: Displays a manually generated GET-only route smoke report from cache.

panels.title: Prompt Library
panels.description: Display-only operator prompt library. Prompts are never executed.

panels.title: File Hygiene
panels.description: Displays a manually generated git/untracked hygiene summary from cache.

panels.title: System Map
panels.description: Display-only map of how the command center is wired (this panel).

scripts.purpose: Generate cached compile/test health report manually.
Generate cached GET-only route smoke report manually.
Generate cached git/untracked file-hygiene report manually.
